title: Peloton Interactive (PTON) Stock Forecast and Analyst Price Targets
text: Peloton Analyst Forecasts and Price Targets. Recent Actions: Goldman Sachs raised its price target on Peloton to $11.5, while Wedbush issued a price target high of $55 on September 25, 2023. TD Cowen issued a low price target of $4 on August 23, 2024, showing wide ranges in analyst opinion. Consensus Rating: The 10 analysts that cover Peloton Interactive stock have a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $8.05, which forecasts a 68.76% increase in the stock price over the next year. Monthly Ratings: In the current month, PTON has received 6 Buy Ratings, 12 Hold Ratings, and 0 Sell Ratings from analysts. Price Target Range: The lowest target is $5.00 and the highest is $55, reflecting significant uncertainty and divergent views on the company's turnaround prospects. Earnings Forecasts: Next quarter's earnings estimate for PTON is $0.07 with a range of $0.04 to $0.10, indicating analyst expectations for profitability returning.
